raw_consumer_statement: I purchased a sweater on XX/XX/year> from XXXX XXXX which I researched as a company in XXXX XXXX woman owned for unique clothing. On XX/XX/XXXX, I received a top that did not look anything that I ordered. The company acknowledged a mixup and they fell short in this instance. They offered me a 20 % discount no refund off the {$42.00} for an item I did not order. I made a dispute with my credit card, Thank you from Citi, getting denied once since they did not find an error dispute. I called back to state that the amount is correct but I didnt get what I ordered. The employee agreed that reason didnt apply and put in another dispute. I got denied again for the same reason. I would not be asking for a refund if I got the item I ordered. This is a classic bait and switch.
